name: @v5x/web
description: Browser workflow layer for VEX V5 Web Serial applications

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:dts && bun run build:esm && bun scripts/verify-built-entrypoints.ts
scripts.build:esm: bun build ./src/index.ts ./src/testing.ts ./src/react/index.ts ./src/svelte/index.ts ./src/solid/index.tsx --root ./src --target browser --format esm --splitting --sourcemap=linked --outdir ./dist --entry-naming='[dir]/[name].js' --chunk-naming='chunks/[name]-[hash].js' --external @v5x/serial --external neverthrow --external react --external svelte --external svelte/reactivity --external solid-js --external solid-js/web --jsx-import-source solid-js --jsx-runtime automatic
scripts.prepack: bun run --cwd ../serial build && bun run build && bun ../../scripts/add-dom-serial-references.ts dist

author: qainguin <slimaster14@gmail.com>
